item.title: Qt5Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:title: Qt5Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt5Gtk2
(Qt Components)
Qt5Gtk2 - GTK+2.0 integration plugins for Qt5
[b]Requirements[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 5.7.0 (with private headers)
- GKT+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://www.opencode.net/trialuser/qt5gtk2/-/releases[/url]
[read more]

- GTK+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]

item.title: Apache NetBeans 25 [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: Apache NetBeans 25 [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: haylemcandelario
item.itunes:summary:
Apache NetBeans 25
(IDEs)
Apache NetBeans es un entorno de desarrollo integrado ( IDE ) potente, de código abierto y galardonado que admite una amplia gama de lenguajes y marcos de programación. Se utiliza ampliamente para desarrollar aplicaciones web, móviles y de escritorio basadas en Java, así como para C/C++, PHP y otros lenguajes.

[read more]
item.description:
Apache NetBeans 25
(IDEs)
Apache NetBeans es un entorno de desarrollo integrado ( IDE ) potente, de código abierto y galardonado que admite una amplia gama de lenguajes y marcos de programación. Se utiliza ampliamente para desarrollar aplicaciones web, móviles y de escritorio basadas en Java, así como para C/C++, PHP y otros lenguajes.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Apache NetBeans 25
(IDEs)
Apache NetBeans es un entorno de desarrollo integrado ( IDE ) potente, de código abierto y galardonado que admite una amplia gama de lenguajes y marcos de programación. Se utiliza ampliamente para desarrollar aplicaciones web, móviles y de escritorio basadas en Java, así como para C/C++, PHP y otros lenguajes.

[read more]

item.title: StackAndConquer [Board]
item.itunes:title: StackAndConquer [Board]
item.itunes:author: ElThoro
item.itunes:summary:
StackAndConquer
(Board)
StackAndConquer is a challenging tower conquest board game inspired by [url=https://spielstein.com/games/mixtour]Mixtour[/url]. Objective is to build a stack of stones with at least five stones and a stone with the players color on top.
[list]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/stackandconquer]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=stackandconquer]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/releases]Windows, AppImage, macOS (untested)[/url]
[/list]
[b]Help wanted:[/b] Contribution for improved/new CPU scripts is highly welcome! A CPU opponent is created via separate JS script. Manual for creating CPU opponents can be found in the [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/wiki/Create-CPU-opponent]games wiki on GitHub[/url]. Any help in translating the game into other languages would also be greatly appreciated (for more information [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues/30]see here[/url])!

Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]
item.description:
StackAndConquer
(Board)
StackAndConquer is a challenging tower conquest board game inspired by [url=https://spielstein.com/games/mixtour]Mixtour[/url]. Objective is to build a stack of stones with at least five stones and a stone with the players color on top.
[list]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/stackandconquer]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=stackandconquer]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/releases]Windows, AppImage, macOS (untested)[/url]
[/list]
[b]Help wanted:[/b] Contribution for improved/new CPU scripts is highly welcome! A CPU opponent is created via separate JS script. Manual for creating CPU opponents can be found in the [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/wiki/Create-CPU-opponent]games wiki on GitHub[/url]. Any help in translating the game into other languages would also be greatly appreciated (for more information [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues/30]see here[/url])!

Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
StackAndConquer
(Board)
StackAndConquer is a challenging tower conquest board game inspired by [url=https://spielstein.com/games/mixtour]Mixtour[/url]. Objective is to build a stack of stones with at least five stones and a stone with the players color on top.
[list]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/stackandconquer]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=stackandconquer]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/releases]Windows, AppImage, macOS (untested)[/url]
[/list]
[b]Help wanted:[/b] Contribution for improved/new CPU scripts is highly welcome! A CPU opponent is created via separate JS script. Manual for creating CPU opponents can be found in the [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/wiki/Create-CPU-opponent]games wiki on GitHub[/url]. Any help in translating the game into other languages would also be greatly appreciated (for more information [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues/30]see here[/url])!

Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/stackandconquer/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]

item.title: Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: walberthvieira
item.itunes:summary:
Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial
(Office Apps)
About the application:
Application developed using Electron. Packaged using AppImageTools. It basically opens the Microsoft Office 365 login screen.

1. Download the Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest file.
2. Unzip it and open the extracted folder.
3. Make the file Instalar.sh executable and execute it.
4. The application has been installed successfully.
5. Delete the Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55 folder and the Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55.zip file, as they are no longer necessary.

Video showing how to install: https://youtu.be/DAcmosUJKyM
-------------------------------------------------------------------
Sobre a aplicação:
Aplicação desenvolvida usando Electron. Empacotada usando AppImageTools. Ela basicamente abre a tela de login do Microsoft Office 365.

1. Baixe o arquivo Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest.
2. Descompacte-o e abra a pasta extraída.
3. Torne o arquivo Instalar.sh executável e o execute.
4. O aplicativo foi instalado com sucesso.
5. Apague a pasta Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55 e o arquivo Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55.zip, pois não são mais necessários.

Vídeo ensinando a instalar:
https://youtu.be/DAcmosUJKyM
[read more]
item.description:
Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial
(Office Apps)
About the application:
Application developed using Electron. Packaged using AppImageTools. It basically opens the Microsoft Office 365 login screen.

1. Download the Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest file.
2. Unzip it and open the extracted folder.
3. Make the file Instalar.sh executable and execute it.

5. Delete the Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55 folder and the Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55.zip file, as they are no longer necessary.

1. Baixe o arquivo Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest.
2. Descompacte-o e abra a pasta extraída.

4. O aplicativo foi instalado com sucesso.
5. Apague a pasta Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55 e o arquivo Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55.zip, pois não são mais necessários.

Vídeo ensinando a instalar:
https://youtu.be/DAcmosUJKyM
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial
(Office Apps)
About the application:
Application developed using Electron. Packaged using AppImageTools. It basically opens the Microsoft Office 365 login screen.

1. Download the Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest file.
2. Unzip it and open the extracted folder.
3. Make the file Instalar.sh executable and execute it.
4. The application has been installed successfully.
5. Delete the Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55 folder and the Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55.zip file, as they are no longer necessary.

Video showing how to install: https://youtu.be/DAcmosUJKyM
-------------------------------------------------------------------
Sobre a aplicação:
Aplicação desenvolvida usando Electron. Empacotada usando AppImageTools. Ela basicamente abre a tela de login do Microsoft Office 365.

1. Baixe o arquivo Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest.
2. Descompacte-o e abra a pasta extraída.
3. Torne o arquivo Instalar.sh executável e o execute.
4. O aplicativo foi instalado com sucesso.
5. Apague a pasta Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55 e o arquivo Microsoft-Office-365-AppImage-20250516-21h55.zip, pois não são mais necessários.

Vídeo ensinando a instalar:
